title: Tone Mapping — ACES, Hable, Reinhard
description: Explains the role of the tone mapping operator in the HDR pipeline (mapping scene-linear light values to display output), covers the Reinhard, Hable/Filmic, and ACES RRT+ODT operators with their response curves, and explains the ACES workflow used in UE5 and film VFX production. Choosing the wrong tone mapper produces characteristic artifacts (washed-out highlights with Reinhard, color shifting with Hable) that significantly affect artistic intent. Students will implement all three tone mapping operators, produce comparison renders, and calibrate the ACES operator for a specific display device using its ST 2084 EOTF curve.
